description: Financial planning, analysis, and reporting templates for budgeting, dashboards, investment evaluation, and revenue modeling

templates.name: Budget Planning Board
templates.description: Collaborative annual or quarterly budget planning with department breakdowns, variance tracking, cash flow forecasts, and approval workflows

templates.name: Financial Dashboard
templates.description: Executive-level financial performance dashboard with KPI scorecards, revenue trends, expense breakdowns, P&L summary, and cash flow waterfall

templates.name: Investment Analysis Board
templates.description: Structured evaluation and comparison of investment opportunities with financial comparisons, risk-return matrices, strategic fit scoring, and due diligence tracking

templates.name: Revenue Model Canvas
templates.description: Comprehensive revenue model canvas mapping revenue streams, pricing tiers, unit economics, cohort retention, growth projections, and scenario analysis
